title: 6PCS Artificial Flowers Bouquets – Real Touch Babys Breath Faux Flowers, Pink & White Fake Gypsophila for Wedding, Party, DIY Floral Arrangements, Home Decor & Table Centerpieces
features: 【Quantity】 Includes 6PCS artificial baby’s breath bouquets (fake gypsophila), each with 3 forks and about 30 small buds per stem. Sturdy stems with lush foliage fit most vases perfectly, ideal for creating elegant artificial flower arrangements for home or event decoration.

【Long-Lasting & Hassle-Free】 These faux flowers require no watering or sunlight, staying vibrant and fresh all year round. A perfect wedding flowers alternative to real blooms—saving you time, money, and maintenance effort.

【Realistic & Soft Touch】 Made with high-quality materials, these real touch baby’s breath artificial flowers mimic the look and feel of fresh gypsophila. Add a natural, romantic vibe to DIY floral arrangements, bridal bouquets, and table centerpieces.

【Versatile Decoration】 Perfect for weddings, parties, home decor, and holiday decorations. Combine multiple packs to create fuller arrangements or mix with other faux flowers to enhance bouquets, wreaths, and event backdrops.

【Note】Main image shows 24–36 pcs for fuller effect—please order more for the same look. If some buds fall off during transport (normal for artificial flowers), simply reattach. For bulk issues, contact us for quick assistance.
